hooks.prompt: Review this session. If TypeScript/TSX files were modified via Edit or Write tools, check: (1) Were tests mentioned or run at any point? (2) Was typecheck run? If code was changed but NEITHER tests nor typecheck were run, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "Code was modified but tests/typecheck were not run. Rule #15: run npm run typecheck and npm test before marking complete."}. If only documentation, config, or markdown files were changed, respond with {"ok": true}. If tests or typecheck were run (even if they had errors that were subsequently fixed), respond with {"ok": true}.
